understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to reach the '+' goal gem tile, which is always located in the direction of gravity. In this episode, gravity was DOWN (pulling the player toward the top of the screen, i.e., decreasing y), so the objective was to navigate upward by exploiting gravity drops after horizontal moves.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT / MOVE_RIGHT). After a horizontal move, gravity acts in the current direction until landing on a solid tile, spike, or the goal. CLICK removes breakable tiles at specified coordinates to open fall paths. Spikes instantly end the run. UNDO reverts the previous action. Each move or click consumes a turn; the player has a limited turn budget per attempt. Passages are columns where a horizontal move leads to a different y-level after gravity, and clicking breakable blocks can create new passages toward the goal.
